The video concludes with a thank you message overlaid on the dancing footage. No vocal music plays; it is instrumental throughout.

scenes.description: The video features a montage of two 3D animated characters, one with blond hair and one with purple hair, performing dance moves and poses. The background is a simple gray studio setting. Text on the right side lists credits for songs, lyrics, music, and special thanks. No vocal music plays.

The characters continue their dance and poses in different scenes, including a room setting with framed pictures on the wall. The text on the right changes to display special thanks, planning, and filming credits. No vocal music plays.
